subject: Properties of Expectation
topic: §46 Expected Value of a Function of Two Random Variables
question: A machine consists of two components, whose lifetimes have the joint density function $f(x,y) = \begin{cases} \frac{1}{50} & \text{for } x > 0, y > 0, x + y < 10 \\ 0 & \text{otherwise.} \end{cases}$ The machine operates until both components fail. Calculate the expected operational time of the machine.
